title: Taxes on beverages of high alcoholic content in lieu of other state excise taxes
doc_html:
343.  Taxes on beverages of high alcoholic content in lieu of other state excise taxes

The taxes on beverages of high alcoholic content are in lieu of and exclusive of all other such state excise or license taxes.  

Acts 1987, No. 696, §1.
doc_text:
343.  Taxes on beverages of high alcoholic content in lieu of other state excise taxes
The taxes on beverages of high alcoholic content are in lieu of and exclusive of all other such state excise or license taxes.
Acts 1987, No. 696, §1.
